caption: In a spacious indoor venue with a blue carpeted floor and high ceilings featuring recessed lighting and ornate chandeliers, several people walk across a stage. The group includes men dressed in traditional attire; one man wears a white embroidered long-sleeved shirt and pants, while several others wear blue traditional outfits. A person in a black outfit follows them. In the background, an audience is seated at round tables, watching the procession. Across the sequence of frames, the people move from left to right across the blue carpet. The man in white leads the group, maintaining a steady pace, while the others follow behind him in a loose line. The lighting remains consistent, illuminating the stage and the architecture of the room as the procession progresses toward the right side of the frame.
